case_title: KEISHA HARRELL et al VS. EDWARD N FRANKLIN

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRELL, KEISHA REAGANS, DEVIN COOKS, ANTONIO VELL, ANTHONY REAGANS, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, EDWARD N SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-25-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-13-2009
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-20-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-27-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2009 CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-13-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KEISHA HARRELL, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-13-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-28-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-15-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRELL, KEISHA REAGANS, DEVIN COOKS, ANTONIO VELL, ANTHONY REAGANS, DEREK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-15-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST KEISHA HARRELL, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-20-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR# 5162. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR# 3689. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Continued To Jun-15-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/15/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR# 3689 (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)
